title: phlomidoschema parviflorum
intro: Phlomidoschema parviflorum is a flowering plant species belonging to the mint family, Lamiaceae. It is also known as the small-flowered phlomidoschema, which is native to Western Australia. The medicinal properties of Phlomidoschema parviflorum include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, and it can be used as a herbal preparation in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
